name: 可持续发展
subject: humanities
domain_name: 全球议题 / Global Issues / Global Issues
curriculum_points: Explain the concept of sustainable development and analyze the tensions between its environmental, social, and economic pillars using models like the triple bottom line (AO1, AO2).
Evaluate strategies for sustainable development at local, national, and global scales, assessing their potential to meet the needs of present and future generations (AO3).
